Image (photo or any graphic) OR Video (up to 60 seconds)
• Must grab immediate attention (“thumb-stopping”)
• Pay attention to lighting, sound, angles, etc.
• Optional: Add multiple media to create Carousel
• Optional: Longer videos (up to 15 min) for IGTV
• Optional: Add filter, text or other effects
Write compelling caption that encourages interaction
• Optional: Add any relevant hashtags (#)
• Optional: Tag brands, friends, other people (@)
Optional: Tag people in photo
Optional: Add the geo-location
POSTS (PHOTOS, VIDEOS):
Choose Media Type (take new photo/video, choose from gallery, boomerang, etc)
Add IG Stories Features (music, stickers, brushes, filters, text, etc)
Share Your Story for all) and/or share with particular audience
STORIES:
Choose length of Reel (15, 30 or 60 seconds)
Choose filter, touch up, music or other options
Shoot a new video or choose video from gallery
REELS:
Give your livestream a title (why the viewers should watch)
Go live and interact with your viewers as they join
LIVES:
Get your content live… and then keep posting!
